user_feedback: level 5 may be too difficult lower the amount of enemies and make the scallign difficult a bit less hard, and instead of having levels go to an extraction point, all levels should require an amount of enemies killed AND an extraction point, also make sure that my reload is very slow and that its based off how much ammo I have collected, there should be instnces where I am out of ammo. And also make it so that weapons have different hit points, like sniper should do atleast 4 or 5 hitpoints of damage per hit, and also lets add so more variety in the types of weapons, perhaps add a rocket launches that does like an explosion effect, and also lets give some more variety in the bullets that the enemies can do,
analysis:
- Issue identified: The game requires gameplay adjustments including difficulty scaling, mission logic unification, ammo management (reserve system), weapon balancing, and new content (Rocket Launcher, enemy bullet variety).
- Files affected: `globals.js`, `entities.js`, `level.js`, `game.js`, `ui.js`, `gym_api.js`
- Changes needed:
    - `globals.js`: Add `rocket_launcher` to WEAPONS, update weapon stats (sniper damage 5, slower reloads), add `reserveAmmo` defaults. Adjust `resetGame` to use "combined" mission type and softer difficulty scaling for level 5+.
    - `entities.js`: Update `Player` to track reserve ammo, handle reloading from reserve, and fire rockets. Update `Bullet` to support types (rocket, enemy variations) and visual variety. Update `Enemy` to shoot varied bullet types.
    - `level.js`: Always spawn extraction point. Adjust enemy count formula. Add rocket launcher pickups.
    - `game.js`: Implement rocket explosion physics/damage. Update win condition to require both kills AND extraction. Update ammo pickup to add to reserve.
    - `ui.js`: Display reserve ammo. Update objective text.
    - `gym_api.js`: Update state observation to reflect new mission structure and ammo system.
